name: claudefiles
description: Portable Claude Code configuration plugins by koolamusic

plugins.name: ux
plugins.description: Frontend design skill with 17 steering commands for impeccable UI/UX. Based on Impeccable (https://impeccable.style).

plugins.name: jira
plugins.description: Lean sprint workflow. Six commands (init/research/plan/execute/review/retro), six agents, .jira/ state, GitHub issue + PR integration, Nyquist validation by default.
